mapper.select: SELECT a.`name` AS teamName, a.home_img AS homeImg, a.details_img AS detailsImg, a.list_img AS listImg, a.introduction AS introduction, a.`index` AS mdtIndex, a.price AS price, b.doctor_user_id AS doctorUserId, b.is_main AS isMain, b.doctor_type AS doctorType, b.price AS mdtTeamDoctorPrice, a.id AS teamId, b.id AS teamDoctorId, c.`name` AS doctorUserName, e.id AS tagId, e.`name`AS tagName, a.mdt_type AS mdtType, b.consultant_id AS consultantId FROM t_mdt_team a LEFT JOIN t_mdt_team_doctor b ON a.id = b.mdt_team_id LEFT JOIN t_doctor_user c ON b.doctor_user_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_mdt_team_tag d ON a.id = d.mdt_team_id LEFT JOIN d_mdt_tag e ON d.tag_id = e.id WHERE a.id = #{mdtTeamId}

SELECT DISTINCT t_mdt_team.*,t_mdt.name as mdtName FROM t_mdt_team LEFT JOIN t_mdt ON t_mdt.id = t_mdt_team.mdt_id LEFT JOIN t_mdt_tag ON t_mdt_tag.mdt_id = t_mdt.id LEFT JOIN d_mdt_tag ON d_mdt_tag.id = t_mdt_tag.tag_id LEFT JOIN t_mdt_team_tag ON t_mdt_team_tag.tag_id = d_mdt_tag.id AND t_mdt_team_tag.mdt_team_id = t_mdt_team.id LEFT JOIN t_mdt_team_doctor ON t_mdt_team.id = t_mdt_team_doctor.mdt_team_id LEFT JOIN t_doctor_user ON t_doctor_user.id = t_mdt_team_doctor.doctor_user_id LEFT JOIN t_doctor_set ON t_doctor_user.id = t_doctor_set.doctor_user_id WHERE t_mdt_team.is_delete = '0' AND t_mdt.is_delete = '0' AND t_mdt.`status` = '1' AND d_mdt_tag.`is_delete` = '0' AND t_mdt_team_doctor.doctor_type = 'CONSULTANT' AND t_doctor_user.is_auth = 'PASS' AND t_doctor_user.is_cancel = '0' AND t_doctor_user.`status` = '1' AND t_doctor_set.is_mdt = '1' AND (t_mdt.name like #{param1,jdbcType=VARCHAR} OR t_doctor_user.hospital_name like #{param1,jdbcType=VARCHAR} OR t_doctor_user.name like #{param1,jdbcType=VARCHAR} OR t_mdt_team.name like #{param1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) ORDER BY t_mdt_team.`index`
